---
title: 'catalog get'
---

Export an entry's archive (a zipped build directory) from the catalog to a
filesystem path. Useful for shipping an entry to a system that doesn't have
catalog access.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog get <name> [OPTIONS]
```

## Arguments

- **`name`** — Entry name to export. Use [`catalog list`](list.qmd) to see options.

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `-o`, `--output` | current directory | Destination directory for the archive. |

The archive is always written to `<output_dir>/<name>.zip` (the entry name with
a `.zip` suffix). Existing files at that path are overwritten.

## Example

```bash
xorq catalog get f02d28198715 -o ./shipped-builds
# → Exported to shipped-builds/f02d28198715.zip
```

The exported archive can be re-added to another catalog with
[`catalog add`](add.qmd).
